item.title: Iran talks to resume this weekend without Vance
item.description: The White House will send Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, as Tehran decides not to send its top negotiator.

item.title: Trump administration moves to add firing squad to federal execution methods
item.description: The Justice Department also said it was reviving a lethal injection protocol used during President Donald Trump’s first term.

item.title: Trump orders more access to psychedelics like LSD, psilocybin and ibogaine
item.description: The president is directing federal agencies to boost research into the drugs and support clinical trials, moves championed by Health Secretary Robert ...

item.title: White House loosens rules for preserving presidential records
item.description: After the Justice Department said a post-Watergate records law is unconstitutional, White House lawyers established a new policy that experts say weak...

item.title: Third U.S. aircraft carrier arrives in waters near Iran
item.description: The path of the USS George H.W. Bush to the Middle East has been closely watched as President Trump demands progress in peace negotiations with Tehran...
